name: coODGetUnsigned
title: coODGetUnsigned
syntax: dwordcoODGetUnsigned( dword index, dword subIndex, dword errCode[] );
description: Returns the value of an object in the local object dictionary without a leading sign. This function can be applied to all objects with a length up to 32 bits. Exceptions are the data type 0x8, 0x9, 0xA, 0xF, and 0x11.
For the use of this function, a note on handling should be considered.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Index of the object, value range 1..65.535
